task_summary: Requested replacement is out of stock. Agent must not force a return; they must offer store credit or waitlist for the unavailable exchange.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must resolve the requested replacement product before deciding.
Agent must not process a return instead of the required exchange decision.
Agent must explain why the exchange cannot be completed and offer the policy-supported alternative.
Agent must not mutate order state for the unavailable or ineligible exchange.

opening_message: I need to exchange my shoes from ORD-7214 for the large shirt, but I heard it may be out of stock. Put me on whatever option works.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7214. Requested replacement is out of stock. Agent must not force a return; they must offer store credit or waitlist for the unavailable exchange. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Ask whether there is a waitlist if out of stock.
Do not ask for a refund unless the agent offers no exchange alternative.
Accept a correct preview or clear policy-supported alternative.
